Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4000 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Puzzle Panic.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0e80 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $0e00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Puzzle Panic.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $0E00 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
